Welcome to the Tropical Penguins collection! This isn't a mistake—it's a migration. Our penguins, tired of the eternal winter, used a misprinted map and found themselves in a lush, sunny paradise. Now, they're the most stylis

minting_now.description:
Imagine being one of the earliest investors in Facebook, TikTok, or Instagram—before the world realized their potential. Now, imagine if your investment wasn’t just a bet on growth but a guaranteed piece of ownership in the company itself.
That’s exactly what the TREND App Inc. NFT Collection offers

minting_now.name: WOOSH by Roberto Santo
minting_now.description:
WOOSH is a 999-piece collection of unique works by Roberto Santo — a multidisciplinary artist whose practice spans sculpture, painting, and global visual culture.

Each piece captures a moment of motion — a distortion of energy frozen in time.

This pre-reveal phase represents the threshold:
the spa

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre)
Our sold-out Plush Bouquet is back just in time for Mother’s Day. More details below.

On checkout, you'll be given the option to include an exclusive Pudgy Penguins Mother’s Day card. Be sure to order by April 29th to ensure delivery in time for Mother’s Day  Available exclusively here: You asked for it. We listened!  The official Pudgy Penguins Sales Bot is live. Follow:

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!

Azuki TCG is now live on Collector Crypt. You’ll find sealed Shao and Raizen Alpha Starter decks inside our new Pop Culture Gacha Machine. A limited batch is live now, with additional boxes rolling out throughout the week. The Anime Multiverse is here.
